title: Ixeris saxatilis
taxonomy: Ixeris saxatilis is classified within the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Ixeris, which is a group of Asian plants. The species Ixeris saxatilis is native to China and is also found in other parts of Asia. This plant is often placed in the tribe Cichorieae, due to its shared characteristics with other members of this group. Further classification may include the species being placed within a particular subtribe or section.
uses: Ixeris saxatilis, a plant native to East Asia, has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments. Its roots and leaves are believed to possess anti-inflammatory properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions.
